channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: West Bengal Election Results: Counting of Votes for 294 Seats Begins Today
item.description: The state of West Bengal is witnessing intense political action as the counting of votes for 294 assembly seats takes place today. The primary question on everyone’s mind is whether Bengal’s so-called...

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs appoint Mats Sundin and John Chayka to lead hockey operations reset
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have unveiled a major overhaul of their hockey operations leadership, appointing former captain Mats Sundin as senior executive adviser and naming John Chayka as general manage...

item.title: Iran conflict and energy crisis speed up global transition away from fossil fuels
item.description: The article argues that the ongoing confrontation between the United States and Iran, particularly around the Strait of Hormuz, is unintentionally accelerating the global transition away from fossil f...

item.title: Hantavirus suspected on MV Hondius cruise ship results in three deaths and one critical patient
item.description: A suspected outbreak of Hantavirus on the MV Hondius, a polar cruise ship operated by Oceanwide Expeditions, has tragically resulted in three deaths and left another passenger in intensive care. The s...

item.title: The Truth Behind Intermittent Fasting: Benefits, Risks, and Who It Works For
item.description: Intermittent fasting (IF) has gained popularity as a health trend, but its effectiveness varies from person to person. Unlike traditional diets that focus on what you eat, IF is all about when you eat...

item.title: Alaska Highway closed near Beaver Creek due to flooding
item.description: The Alaska Highway has been temporarily closed just north of Beaver Creek in the Yukon due to flooding, affecting the section from the U.S. border to the Beaver Creek Canada Customs office. Government...

item.title: Labour Party Unveils Timetable for 2027 Elections, Sets Dates and Fees for Primaries
item.description: The Labour Party don come out with their timetable and programme for the 2027 general elections. According to the party, their primaries go happen in two main phases: House of Assembly and governorshi...

item.title: Jaishankar highlights historical roots and future potential of India-Jamaica relations during visit
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, during his visit to Jamaica, underlined that India-Jamaica relations are defined by both continuity and change, reflecting a strong historical foundation along...

item.title: Historical roots and current reasons behind xenophobic violence against Nigerians in South Africa
item.description: This article explore the reasons why some South Africans commit violent attacks against Nigerians and other African immigrants. The writer trace the behaviour back to the long-lasting effects of Apart...

item.title: Trump’s broken promises leave young Americans frustrated
item.description: A significant shift is occurring among young Americans aged 18 to 29, with President Trump seeing a steep decline in approval ratings from this demographic. While he initially received unexpected supp...

item.title: Bear spray incident prompts evacuation at North Battleford church
item.description: On Sunday morning, St. Paul’s Anglican Church in North Battleford, Saskatchewan, experienced a serious incident when a man released bear spray inside the building. The RCMP reported that the disturban...

item.title: Ed Sheeran joins Ipswich Town team to celebrate promotion to Premier League
item.description: British singer-songwriter Ed Sheeran, who grew up in Ipswich, marked the football club Ipswich Town's promotion to the Premier League by joining the team in their dressing room for a celebratory singa...

item.title: Minister Tolashe faces scrutiny over alleged misuse of state funds for family nanny
item.description: Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe is under fire for allegedly employing a nanny for her grandchildren using state funds, with claims that nearly half the nanny's salary was redirected to her ...

item.title: TMC Leader Demands Suspension of IPS Officer After Repoll Ordered in Falta
item.description: Trinamool Congress leader Kunal Ghosh has strongly criticised IPS officer Ajay Pal Sharma, known for his 'Singham' persona, following allegations of widespread rigging during the April 29 polling in W...

item.title: Fusengbuwa Ruling House urges Ogun Governor to resume Awujale selection process
item.description: The Fusengbuwa Ruling House for Ijebu-Ode, Ogun State, don call on Governor Dapo Abiodun to sharply lift the suspension wey dey on the selection of the next Awujale. The Chairman, Otunba Abdul Lateef ...

item.title: Eastern Cape woman tragically killed amid domestic dispute
item.description: The rural community of Ngqamakhwe in the Eastern Cape is reeling following the fatal stabbing of 42-year-old Tembisa Ntonga at her in-laws’ homestead in Jekezi village. Police have indicated that Nton...

item.title: Former NYC Mayor Rudy Giuliani Hospitalized in Critical but Stable Condition
item.description: Former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani has been admitted to the hospital and is currently in critical but stable condition, according to statements posted on X by political strategist Ted Goodman. G...

item.title: WHO investigates hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship voyage in the Atlantic
item.description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship traveling in the Atlantic Ocean has resulted in three deaths and several serious illnesses, according to the World Health Organization (WHO). The s...

item.title: Taylor Swift reflects on intense fan theories and boundaries in interpreting her songs
item.description: American singer-songwriter Taylor Swift recently shared her thoughts on how fans interpret and analyse her music, particularly the trend of “detective work” among Swifties. While she appreciates the p...

item.title: Carlos Yulo shows support at sibling's house blessing event
item.description: Philippine gymnast and Olympic medalist Carlos Yulo recently attended the house blessing of his siblings, expressing pride in their achievements. The event, which took place in May 2026, saw Yulo offe...
